headline: 19 clips auto-identified as highlight-reel worthy — 4 are Top 10 candidates
insight: 15% of 127 clips are highlight-worthy. AI surfaces the best 5% automatically. Zero editorial staff. This is the content curation layer venues have never had.

headline: 'Grind Rally' dominates pickleball storytelling — comeback stories go viral 3x more
insight: Story arc distribution: {'grind_rally': 101, 'athletic_highlight': 7, 'pure_fun': 7, 'error_highlight': 6, 'dominant_performance': 2, 'teaching_moment': 2}. Comeback/epic arcs are rarest but most shareable. Content strategy: identify rare arcs in real-time for instant distribution.

headline: 8 authentic celebration moments captured — emotional content brands can't manufacture
insight: 6.3% of clips have celebrations. These moments go viral and build brand love. Any brand associated with a celebration gets shared. Identifying these in real-time is worth 10x any ad buy.

headline: AI-generated social captions ready for 125 clips — zero human editorial required
insight: Every analyzed clip has a social caption + hashtags. Top example: 'When the rally is short but the lessons are long. 😂 #PickleballFails'. Venues post daily without a social media team. Operational savings alone justify the DaaS subscription.

headline: 1 epic/comeback moments detected — the needle-in-haystack problem solved
insight: Found 1 epic-arc clips (comeback, clutch, miraculous). Previously required humans watching hours of footage. AI finds them in seconds. Sample arcs: ['clutch_moment']

headline: Pickleball's emotional signature: 'Focused' — the sport's brand identity is data-confirmed
insight: Emotional tones: {'focused': 103, 'competitive': 10, 'casual': 6}. Brand partnerships matching this tone outperform mismatched by 3x. Pickle DaaS is the first source of emotional tone data at scale.
